summary: M446 — Kill the bottom combat panel on mobile (round 4). M438/M444/M445 hid pieces — the active-actor card, the .ev-corner ornaments, the .ev-companion-row — but the .ev-hud container itself still painted a bg gradient + border-top + box-shadow across the bottom of the screen, which IS the panel line the user kept seeing. M446 strips all of .ev-hud's chrome on mobile (background, border, box-shadow, padding, gap zeroed). The mobile portrait strip is also hidden (redundant with the turn-strip portraits at the top). Spell rail still works for manual targeting; nothing draws a panel line at the bottom anymore.
